meta.title: AoD | How to Defeat Mexico’s Drug Cartels (feat. Bill Barr)
meta.description:
Former US Attorney General and Hudson Institute Distinguished Fellow Bill Barr joins Arsenal of Democracy to discuss the drug crisis in the United States, the role of Mexico’s drug cartels, and what the US can do about it.

Read AG Barr’s op-ed, “The US Must Defeat Mexico’s Drug Cartels” here: https://www.wsj.com/articles/the-us-must-defeat-mexicos-drug-cartels-narco-terrorism-amlo-el-chapo-crenshaw-military-law-enforcement-b8fac731

William P. Barr is a distinguished fellow at Hudson Institute. He served as US attorney general from 1991 to 1993 and from 2018 to 2020.

Arsenal of Democracy is a weekly podcast produced by Hudson Institute and hosted by Marshall Kosloff. Subscribe for the latest episodes and content.

Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/arsenal-of-democracy/id1701812241
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/2DvzfhSJPvZeXrEAFKG3jG
